summary: EXP-395 recommends declining the EXP-183 schema extension. Dome's machine layer (ai_manifest, claim_index, methodology) has been static at last_updated:2026-04-17 for 30 days; author has classified zero additional WINs since EXP-183 was written. Two of EXP-183's six proposed schema fields (author_registry_status, author_strict_prospective_confirmed) reference per-entry fields that do not exist in dome's claim_index.json — claim_index has top-level key "claims" (not "entries"), and entries carry "status" (not "registry_status"); strict_prospective_confirmed exists only as an aggregate count in ai_manifest. Replace with a static Part 4.6.x prose subsection (~280 words) enumerating the 9 actually-classified entries plus a re-evaluation trigger keyed on claims.length>20 or last_updated advancing past 2026-04-17. Closing all three coupled ISSs together: ISS-1130 (schema) and ISS-1147 (duplicate of 1130) close as superseded by EXP-395; ISS-1164 (don't-render-empty rendering decision) closes as obviated (no schema = no empty fields to render).
